title: Rs 1,364 Crore Push for Railway Safety: What Is Kavach System and How It Works to Prevent Train Accidents in India
description: Indian Railways is accelerating safety upgrades with a Rs 1,364 crore push for the Kavach system, an advanced train collision avoidance technology. Designed to reduce human error and prevent accidents, Kavach is set to transform railway safety across high-density routes in India.
